- actor concentration
- service bottleneck posture

# ============================================================
# 2. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Congestion and density reflection architecture must remain:

- density-aware

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/080.infrastructure-placement/00208019_DISASTER_AND_FAILURE_REFLECTION_ARCHITECTURE.md

# ============================================================
# 1. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Map and world-visible layers
must reflect high-impact events such as:

- disaster damage
- flood or fire spread
- infrastructure outage
- facility failure
- emergency response posture

# ============================================================
# 2. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Disaster and failure reflection architecture must remain:

- high-impact-aware
- outage-aware
- emergency-aware

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/080.infrastructure-placement/2800001_INITIAL_INFRASTRUCTURE_PLACEMENT_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL INFRASTRUCTURE PLACEMENT ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: infrastructure-seed
component: initial-infrastructure-placement

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for initial infrastructure placement
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Initial infrastructure placement must reflect:
- nation identity
- city role
- population scale
- zoning posture
- geography and disaster profile
- industry and logistics needs

Infrastructure is not generic utility only.
It is part of national identity and world function.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city infrastructure seed should define:
- transport infrastructure
- utility infrastructure
- logistics and storage infrastructure
- emergency and resilience infrastructure


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Infrastructure seed is a first-class layer
that binds economy, housing, and governance together.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/080.infrastructure-placement/2840001_INITIAL_ADMIN_PORT_RAIL_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL ADMIN PORT RAIL SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: admin-port-rail-seed
component: initial-admin-port-rail-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for initial administrative facilities,
port facilities, and railway facilities
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Administrative, port, and railway facilities must reflect:
- nation identity
- capital structure
- city role
- logistics posture
- political and military control posture
- historical traces

These facilities are core structural institutions,
not optional decorative objects.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each seed should define:
- central administrative facility names
- city administrative facility names
- port authority and harbor naming
- railway station, hub, and control naming
- city-level assignment of these facilities


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Administrative, port, and railway seed
must explain how the civilization is actually governed and moved.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209001_CONTINENTAL_AND_ECOSYSTEM_PROGRESSION_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# CONTINENTAL AND ECOSYSTEM PROGRESSION ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: continental-and-ecosystem-progression
component: continental-and-ecosystem-progression

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Define the canonical architecture
for continental progression,
ecosystem progression,
facility and infrastructure autonomous progression,
and multi-layer propagation
inside Civilization.

This document expands world progression
beyond state, city, and actor layers.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Civilization progression
must also include progression of:

- continents
- facilities
- infrastructure
- flora
- fauna
- cross-layer propagation

These must be treated
as active simulation layers,
not static background layers only.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED CHILD ARCHITECTURES
# ============================================================

This document requires:

- CONTINENTAL_PROGRESSION_ARCHITECTURE
- FACILITY_AUTONOMOUS_OPERATION_ARCHITECTURE
- INFRASTRUCTURE_LIFECYCLE_AND_FAILURE_ARCHITECTURE
- FLORA_AND_FAUNA_PROGRESSION_ARCHITECTURE
- MULTI_LAYER_PROPAGATION_ARCHITECTURE


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Continental and ecosystem progression architecture must remain:

- multi-layered
- time-driven
- environment-aware
- facility-aware
- propagation-aware


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209002_LIFE_STAGE_EVENT_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# LIFE STAGE EVENT ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: civilization-life-events
component: life-stage-event

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

This document defines the official architecture
for life stage events inside Civilization.

Life stage events govern structured progression
across birth, childcare, school, examination,
career entry, family formation, housing, health,
aging, inheritance, and death.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Life events must not be modeled
as isolated ad hoc triggers only.

They must belong to a structured event system
with explicit:
- trigger
- eligibility
- prerequisite
- duration
- cost
- outcome
- affected actors
- related facilities


# ============================================================
# 3. EVENT FAMILIES
# ============================================================

Official life event families:

- birth_and_childcare
- school_and_growth
- exam_and_path
- career_entry
- relationship_and_family
- housing_and_living
- health_and_welfare
- aging_and_end_of_life


# ============================================================
# 4. CIVILIZATION CONNECTION
# ============================================================

Life stage events connect to:
- person growth
- family structures
- school and training facilities
- companies and employment
- housing and property
- nation public services
- health and welfare systems


# ============================================================
# 5. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Life stage events are a first-class Civilization layer
and must be modeled as a structured system.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209003_HOUSING_BUILDER_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# CITY BUILDER ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: life-events-and-builders
component: city-builder

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the official architecture
for City Builder.

City Builder is separate from Company Builder
and Nation Builder.

City Builder handles:

- housing placement
- residential block placement
- urban block placement
- city center placement
- living area composition
- city core composition
- district-scale local layout


# ============================================================
# 2. BUILDER SEPARATION
# ============================================================

City Builder and Company Builder
must remain separate.

City Builder handles urban spatial composition.

Company Builder handles enterprise structure.

Nation Builder handles institutional
and sovereign structure.


# ============================================================
# 3. PRIMARY OBJECT FAMILIES
# ============================================================

primary_object_families:
- housing
- residential_blocks
- urban_blocks
- city_centers
- civic_core_zones
- mixed_living_districts
- settlement_expansion_zones


# ============================================================
# 4. PRIMARY ACTIONS
# ============================================================

primary_actions:
- place_housing
- place_residential_block
- place_urban_block
- place_city_center
- place_prefectural_capital_core
- place_regional_capital_core
- configure_living_area_layout
- expand_settlement_zone


# ============================================================
# 5. NATION BUILDER RELATION
# ============================================================

Nation Builder may define:

- capital rules
- city hierarchy rules
- prefectural capital existence
- regional capital existence
- city-scale governance assumptions

City Builder determines
actual map placement and layout.


# ============================================================
# 6. COMPANY BUILDER RELATION
# ============================================================

Company Builder may place:

- headquarters
- stores
- branches
- enterprise facilities

City Builder determines
the surrounding urban structure
into which those objects are placed.


# ============================================================
# 7. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

City Builder is the canonical
urban spatial builder.

It is not limited to housing-only placement.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209004_EXHIBITION_BUILDER_ARCHITECTURE.md

# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the official architecture for Exhibition Builder.

This builder supports digital art exhibitions,
screenings, gallery events, decoration,
equipment placement, and artwork layout.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE UI SECTIONS
# ============================================================

Supported sections:
- venue selection
- room / zone selection
- decoration selection
- equipment placement
- artwork placement
- route design
- lighting design
- capacity and safety validation
- opening schedule


# ============================================================
# 3. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Exhibition Builder is a first-class spatial editing UI,
not only an event metadata editor.

Must support:

# ============================================================
# 3. FINAL RULE

Exhibition UI must behave as a spatial builder.

for Persona training facilities.

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209007_FITNESS_COMPANY_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# FITNESS COMPANY ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: fitness-and-training
component: fitness-company

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the official architecture for fitness_company.

fitness_company is a user-creatable company type
that provides physical training, conditioning,
wellness, and habit-building services for Persona growth.


# ============================================================
# 2. REQUIRED SITES
# ============================================================

Required:
- headquarters
- gym_site

Optional:
- branch
- training_facility_site
- fitness_studio_site


# ============================================================
# 3. PROVIDED SERVICES
# ============================================================

Supported services:
- gym_membership
- training_program
- personal_training_session
- group_fitness_session
- body_conditioning_program
- diet_support_program
- wellness_program
- fitness_event_access


# ============================================================
# 4. MEDICAL BOUNDARY
# ============================================================

fitness_company does not perform:
- diagnosis
- treatment
- prescription
- regulated medical service


# ============================================================
# 5. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

fitness_company is a training and wellness company,
not a medical company.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209008_PUBLIC_TRAINING_FACILITY_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# PUBLIC TRAINING FACILITY ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: public-training-facilities
component: public-training-facility

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the architecture for nation-owned public training facilities.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Military, firefighter, rescue, and similar state facilities
are nation facilities, not ordinary company facilities.

They are placed through Nation Builder facility placement.


# ============================================================
# 3. ACCESS RULE
# ============================================================

Access is restricted to:
- government_employee_only
- assigned_personnel_only
- public_service_access_only


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

State training facilities belong to Nation Builder,
not to ordinary company builder flows.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209009_INITIAL_CIVIL_REGISTRY_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL CIVIL REGISTRY SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: civil-registry-seed
component: initial-civil-registry-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for civil registry, family registry,
birth and death registration,
marriage registration,
inheritance registration,
and funeral-linked civil institutions
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Civil registry facilities must reflect:
- nation identity
- family structure
- religion and memorial posture
- legal and civic procedure culture
- education and welfare linkage
- urban and rural accessibility

These facilities are core institutions
that connect life events to legal reality.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- birth registry facilities
- marriage registry facilities
- death registry facilities
- family and citizen registry facilities
- inheritance registry facilities
- funeral and memorial civil support facilities
- city-level assignment


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Civil registry seed must make visible
how life events become recognized, recorded,
and socially processed in each nation.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209010_INITIAL_TOURISM_ENTERTAINMENT_CULTURE_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md

# ============================================================
# INITIAL TOURISM ENTERTAINMENT CULTURE SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: tourism-entertainment-culture-seed
component: initial-tourism-entertainment-culture-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for initial tourism facilities,
entertainment facilities,
and cultural facilities
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Tourism, entertainment, and culture facilities must reflect:
- nation identity
- city role
- religion and ritual posture
- nightlife and consumption posture
- memorial and historical posture
- education and art posture

These facilities are structural city-identity institutions,
not optional decoration.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- tourism naming posture
- entertainment naming posture
- cultural naming posture
- city-level assignment
- special ritual or nightlife distinctions if applicable


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Tourism, entertainment, and culture seed
must make leisure, memory, art, and civic expression visible.


# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for initial sports facilities,
exercise facilities,
life-leisure facilities,
and civic recreation facilities
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Sports and life-leisure facilities must reflect:
- nation identity
- city role
- age structure
- household structure
- training posture
- class and density structure
- school and work culture


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- sports naming posture
- exercise facility naming posture
- civic recreation naming posture
- city-level assignment
- distinction between military training and civilian sport if relevant


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Sports and leisure seed must make visible
how bodies are trained, maintained, entertained,
and socially organized.

for initial childcare facilities,

in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Childcare and early-family support facilities must reflect:
- nation identity
- age structure
- household structure
- work style
- education posture
- religion and civic welfare posture
- transport and neighborhood accessibility


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- nursery naming posture
- kindergarten naming posture
- childcare support naming posture

- city-level assignment

# 4. FINAL RULE

how early life, family support, and working households
are sustained in each nation.

# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for relationship support facilities,
marriage support facilities,
wedding facilities,
newlywed support facilities,
and early household formation support
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Marriage and family-formation facilities must reflect:
- nation identity
- household structure
- religion and ritual posture
- class structure
- housing access
- employment and life-course timing
- urban and island accessibility


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- relationship and matchmaking naming posture
- marriage support naming posture
- wedding facility naming posture
- newlywed housing support naming posture
- city-level assignment


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Marriage and family-formation seed must make visible
how relationships are recognized,
how households are formed,
and how new family life becomes stable.

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209014_INITIAL_ELDERCARE_AND_END_OF_LIFE_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL ELDERCARE AND END-OF-LIFE SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: eldercare-and-end-of-life-seed
component: initial-eldercare-and-end-of-life-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for eldercare facilities,
long-term care facilities,
retirement support structures,
and end-of-life support facilities
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Eldercare and end-of-life support must reflect:
- nation identity
- household structure
- family responsibility norms
- civic welfare posture
- labor and retirement logic
- religion and memorial culture
- urban and island accessibility

These facilities are not generic welfare objects.
They reveal how each society understands aging,
dependency, dignity, and final support.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- eldercare naming posture
- family-care vs facility-care posture
- end-of-life support posture
- retirement support posture
- city-level assignment
- national exceptions if applicable


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Eldercare and end-of-life seed must make visible
how old age is lived,
how dependency is supported,
and how final life stages are institutionally handled.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209015_INITIAL_RELIGIOUS_AND_PUBLIC_CALENDAR_ARCHITECTURE.md

# ============================================================
# INITIAL RELIGIOUS AND PUBLIC CALENDAR ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: religious-and-public-calendar-seed
component: initial-religious-and-public-calendar

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for religious observances,
national holidays,
seasonal civic festivals,
memorial days,
and calendar-linked public events
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Calendar events must reflect:
- foundation theology
- nation identity
- public memory
- labor and school rhythm
- mourning and celebration culture
- urban and island civic life
- market and tourism effects

Calendar structure is not decorative.
It is a runtime social system.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and civilization-wide calendar seed should define:
- major religious observances
- national holidays
- civic and seasonal festivals
- memorial days
- calendar effects on schools, labor, public facilities, and markets


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Religious and public calendar seed must make visible
how time itself is socially structured.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209016_INITIAL_RISK_AND_DISRUPTION_EVENT_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md

# ============================================================
# INITIAL RISK AND DISRUPTION EVENT SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

layer: architecture
scope: risk-and-disruption-event-seed
component: initial-risk-and-disruption-event-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for crime events,
accident events,
illness events,
job-loss events,
bankruptcy events,
and household disruption events
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Risk and disruption events must reflect:
- nation identity
- welfare posture
- labor structure
- legal structure
- medical support structure
- family resilience
- housing and debt fragility
- public safety and instability level


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation seed should define:
- crime exposure posture
- accident exposure posture
- illness and care disruption posture
- unemployment and job-loss posture
- debt and bankruptcy posture
- fragile household recovery posture


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Risk seed must make visible
how ordinary life is damaged,
how households break,
and how societies absorb or fail to absorb crisis.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209017_CONTINENTAL_PROGRESSION_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# CONTINENTAL PROGRESSION ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: continental-progression
component: continental-progression

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Define the canonical architecture
for autonomous continental progression
inside Civilization.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Continents must be treated as
active macro-geographic progression units.

Continental progression may include:

- climate-zone tendency
- population drift
- trade-zone structure
- conflict-zone structure
- epidemic spread posture
- resource concentration posture
- cultural and civilizational tendency


# ============================================================
# 3. INPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative continental inputs include:

- planetary environment
- inter-state trade
- migration flow
- war posture
- epidemic posture
- resource distribution
- infrastructure corridors
- city concentration
- continent-scale policy or alliance posture


# ============================================================
# 4. OUTPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative continental outputs include:

- continental growth/decline posture
- region imbalance posture
- trade concentration posture
- broad instability posture
- large-scale migration pressure
- broad environmental risk concentration


# ============================================================
# 5. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Continental progression architecture must remain:

- macro-geographic
- multi-state-aware
- migration-aware
- trade-aware
- instability-aware


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209018_FACILITY_AUTONOMOUS_OPERATION_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# FACILITY AUTONOMOUS OPERATION ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: facility-autonomous-operation
component: facility-autonomous-operation

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Define the canonical architecture
for facility-level autonomous progression
inside Civilization.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Facilities must be treated as
autonomously progressing operational entities.

Facility progression may include:

- operating
- underused
- overloaded
- degraded
- damaged
- under maintenance
- restored
- abandoned where applicable
- repurposed where applicable


# ============================================================
# 3. INPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative facility inputs include:

- actor usage
- staffing
- supply and inventory
- infrastructure dependency
- maintenance burden
- environmental burden
- disaster burden
- economic demand
- policy restriction


# ============================================================
# 4. OUTPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative facility outputs include:

- service availability
- failure posture
- quality decline
- queue burden
- maintenance requirement
- closure risk
- linked-facility impact


# ============================================================
# 5. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Facility autonomous operation architecture must remain:

- facility-scale
- service-aware
- dependency-aware
- maintenance-aware
- failure-capable


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209019_INFRASTRUCTURE_LIFECYCLE_AND_FAILURE_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INFRASTRUCTURE LIFECYCLE AND FAILURE ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: infrastructure-lifecycle-and-failure
component: infrastructure-lifecycle-and-failure

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Define the canonical architecture
for infrastructure lifecycle,
degradation,
failure,
and restoration
inside Civilization.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Infrastructure must progress over time.

It may experience:

- load increase
- wear and degradation
- service reduction
- failure
- partial outage
- emergency restoration
- scheduled restoration
- replacement or upgrade


# ============================================================
# 3. INPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative infrastructure inputs include:

- traffic or service load
- maintenance level
- disaster impact
- climate stress
- sabotage or incident posture where supported
- age and prior condition
- dependency graph posture


# ============================================================
# 4. OUTPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative outputs include:

- capacity change
- coverage change
- outage posture
- restoration queue
- downstream facility impact
- city burden
- state burden


# ============================================================
# 5. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Infrastructure lifecycle and failure architecture must remain:

- load-aware
- degradation-aware
- outage-capable
- restoration-capable
- dependency-aware


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209020_FLORA_AND_FAUNA_PROGRESSION_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# FLORA AND FAUNA PROGRESSION ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: flora-and-fauna-progression
component: flora-and-fauna-progression

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Define the canonical architecture
for flora and fauna progression
inside Civilization.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Plants and animals
must be treated as active life-system layers.

Progression may include:

- growth
- reproduction
- illness
- decline
- death
- habitat movement
- domesticated productivity change
- ecosystem stress response


# ============================================================
# 3. INPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative inputs include:

- season
- climate
- water
- food availability
- habitat quality
- disaster effect
- disease effect
- human and city pressure
- agricultural control where applicable


# ============================================================
# 4. OUTPUTS
# ============================================================

Representative outputs include:

- crop yield posture
- livestock condition posture
- habitat change posture
- food-chain stress posture
- agricultural impact
- ecosystem balance posture


# ============================================================
# 5. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Flora and fauna progression architecture must remain:

- life-cycle-aware
- habitat-aware
- agriculturally relevant
- ecosystem-aware


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/002.world/090.life-events-and-world-events/00209021_MULTI_LAYER_PROPAGATION_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# MULTI LAYER PROPAGATION ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: multi-layer-propagation
component: multi-layer-propagation

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Define the canonical architecture
for cross-layer propagation
inside Civilization.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Civilization systems
must support propagation across layers.

Representative propagation families include:

- disaster propagation
- epidemic propagation
- migration propagation
- infrastructure-failure propagation
- economic shock propagation
- crime and instability propagation
- logistics disruption propagation


# ============================================================
# 3. LAYER RELATION
# ============================================================

Propagation may occur across:

- space and planetary layers
- continent and state layers
- state and city layers
- city and district layers
- infrastructure and facility layers
- facility and actor layers


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Multi-layer propagation architecture must remain:

- cross-layer
- event-capable
- failure-capable
- epidemic-capable
- shock-capable


# ============================================================

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/003.foundation/010.world-foundation-boundary/0200030002_WORLD_FOUNDATION_BOUNDARY_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# WORLD FOUNDATION BOUNDARY ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: foundation

## PURPOSE
Define the boundary between universal world structure and domain-specific logic.

## RULES
- World existence model belongs to foundation
- Nation, company, law, war, persona remain domain-owned
- Cross-domain references must pass through explicit IDs
- No hidden cross-layer mutation is allowed

## BOUNDARY EXAMPLES
Foundation:
- world identity
- timeline base
- canonical namespace
- domain registry

Not foundation:
- taxation rules
- company behavior
- persona emotion logic
- battle resolution


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/003.foundation/010.world-foundation-boundary/02000301000_WORLD_FOUNDATION_BOUNDARY_ARCHITECTURE_INDEX.md

# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/003.foundation/020.layer-boundary/00302001_CIVILIZATION_SKILL_ACQUISITION_BOUNDARY_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# CIVILIZATION SKILL ACQUISITION BOUNDARY ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
scope: civilization.skill.acquisition.boundary.architecture
system: civilization-os
owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# PURPOSE

Define the official boundary between Civilization-side
learning opportunities and PersonaOS-side skill truth.


# RULE

CivilizationOS may define:

- training
- education
- work experience
- practice session
- learning event
- skill-acquisition opportunity

These may trigger Persona skill gain or skill growth.


# TRUTH BOUNDARY

CivilizationOS is the source of:
- learning opportunity
- training event
- education event
- work-experience event

PersonaOS is the source of:
- skill definition master
- Persona-owned skill truth
- skill level state
- skill capability exposure


# CONSTRAINT

CivilizationOS must not become
the source of Persona skill truth.

Civilization-side learning events must resolve
into PersonaOS-defined skills.


# FINAL DEFINITION

CivilizationOS provides world-side opportunities
for skill gain and growth.
PersonaOS remains the sole owner
of skill definition and Persona-owned skill truth.

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/003.foundation/0200030001_FOUNDATION_OVERVIEW_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# FOUNDATION OVERVIEW ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: foundation
owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero

## PURPOSE
Define the architectural role of the foundation layer in Civilization OS.

## SCOPE
The foundation layer provides:
- global identifiers
- namespace rules
- cross-domain boundaries
- canonical shared primitives
- immutable structural contracts

## PRINCIPLES
- Foundation is lower than domain architecture
- Domain layers may depend on foundation
- Foundation must not depend on higher business rules
- Shared primitives must be explicit and minimal

## CORE ELEMENTS
- world_id
- system_config
- namespace
- domain_boundary
- canonical_id_rule

## OUTPUT
Foundation architecture acts as the base contract
for model, runtime, flow, interface, and policy.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/003.foundation/0200030004_CANONICAL_ID_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# CANONICAL ID ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: foundation

## PURPOSE
Define canonical identifier rules.

## RULES
- Every major entity must have a stable canonical ID
- IDs must be immutable after creation
- Human-readable names are not identifiers
- Cross-domain references must use canonical IDs only

## TARGET ENTITIES
- world
- nation
- city
- player
- persona
- company
- policy
- treaty
- runtime job


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/003.foundation/030.core-entity-lifecycle/0200030003_CORE_ENTITY_LIFECYCLE_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# CORE ENTITY LIFECYCLE ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: foundation

## PURPOSE
Define lifecycle stages for canonical entities.

## LIFECYCLE
draft
registered
active
suspended
archived
deleted_logical

## RULES
- Physical deletion is prohibited for canonical entities
- Lifecycle transitions must be event-driven
- State transitions must be auditable

# ============================================================

# NAMESPACE ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: foundation

## PURPOSE
Define namespace separation across Civilization OS.

## NAMESPACE RULE
Each artifact must belong to exactly one primary namespace.

## EXAMPLES
- foundation
- world
- player
- persona
- economy
- law
- government
- war
- runtime
- interface
- meta

## CONSTRAINTS
- No ambiguous namespace ownership
- No duplicate canonical model names across namespaces

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/005.story/020.historical-progression/00502001_PERSONAL_RISE_AND_FALL_PLAY_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# PERSONAL RISE AND FALL PLAY ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: personal-rise-and-fall-play
component: personal-rise-and-fall-play

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for personal ascent,
career expansion,
fall from power,
and social collapse play
inside Civilization.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Civilization play must support
small beginnings and large consequences.

A user may rise through:

- education
- business
- military
- political office
- media influence
- faction support

A user may fall through:

- bankruptcy
- scandal
- defeat
- arrest
- purge
- exile
- execution_path_if_allowed_by nation rules


# ============================================================
# 3. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Personal play must connect
individual trajectory
to world-scale consequence.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/005.story/020.historical-progression/02000502000_HISTORICAL_PROGRESSION_ARCHITECTURE_INDEX.md

# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/005.story/020.historical-progression/3000001_INITIAL_EARLY_LIFE_AND_CHILDHOOD_EVENT_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL EARLY LIFE AND CHILDHOOD EVENT SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: early-life-and-childhood-event-seed
component: initial-early-life-and-childhood-event-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for birth, infant care, early childhood,
childhood growth, household-dependent development,
and early education transition events
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Early-life and childhood events must reflect:
- nation identity
- household structure
- childcare posture
- education posture
- welfare posture
- class structure
- religion and civic registration structure

These events are not generic age ticks.
They define how a new citizen enters society.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- birth event posture
- infant support event posture
- household care event posture
- nursery and kindergarten transition posture
- early aptitude or developmental evaluation posture if applicable
- family difficulty and support intervention posture
- city-level and nation-level event differences


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Early-life seed must make visible
how society receives a newborn,
how children are supported,
and how inequality begins to shape life trajectories.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/005.story/020.historical-progression/3040001_INITIAL_POST_GRADUATION_AND_LIFE_COURSE_BRANCHING_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL POST GRADUATION AND LIFE COURSE BRANCHING SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: post-graduation-and-life-course-branching-seed
component: initial-post-graduation-and-life-course-branching-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for post-graduation branching,
direct work entry,
higher-education continuation,
exam-repeat routes,
family-business succession,
state service connection,
and delayed life-course branching
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Post-graduation branching must reflect:
- nation identity
- education posture
- hiring culture
- class structure
- family-business inheritance
- military or state-service interruption
- instability and informal labor routes

These are not simple graduation outcomes.
They define the actual conversion
from student status into adult social position.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation seed should define:
- lower-secondary exit branching
- upper-secondary exit branching
- university exit branching
- exam-repeat and retry posture
- family-business succession posture
- military or state-service connection
- unstable or precarious branching posture


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Post-graduation branching seed must make visible
how education becomes work, delay, inheritance,
service, instability, or exclusion.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/005.story/020.historical-progression/3050001_INITIAL_LIFE_COURSE_AND_FAMILY_TIMING_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL LIFE COURSE AND FAMILY TIMING SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: life-course-and-family-timing-seed
component: initial-life-course-and-family-timing-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for adult life-course timing,
marriage timing,
childbirth timing,
housing acquisition timing,
and household stabilization timing
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Life-course timing must reflect:
- nation identity
- education duration
- hiring culture
- military interruption
- housing access
- family norms
- class and inheritance structure
- non-regular work prevalence


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation seed should define:
- first job timing posture
- marriage timing posture
- childbirth timing posture
- rental-to-ownership timing posture
- family-business inheritance timing posture
- delayed adulthood posture
- unstable household formation posture


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Life-course seed must make visible
how citizens become workers,
partners, parents, and household builders.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/005.story/020.historical-progression/3060001_INITIAL_END_OF_LIFE_INHERITANCE_AND_SUCCESSION_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL END OF LIFE INHERITANCE AND SUCCESSION SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: end-of-life-inheritance-and-succession-seed
component: initial-end-of-life-inheritance-and-succession-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for death events,
funeral routing,
inheritance events,
family-business succession,
estate distribution,
and post-death household transition
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

End-of-life, inheritance, and succession must reflect:
- nation identity
- religion and memorial posture
- household structure
- property regime
- class structure
- family-business logic
- legal and civic registration structure

These are not simple end states.
They define how the dead are processed,
how households survive loss,
and how power and assets continue.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation seed should define:
- death registration posture
- funeral routing posture
- inheritance posture
- family-business succession posture
- fragile-household transition posture
- state intervention posture if applicable


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

End-of-life seed must make visible
how death changes households, property,
status, and institutional continuity.


# ============================================================

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/007.persona/010.persona-core/0200070001_PERSONA_CORE_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# PERSONA CORE ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: persona

# ============================================================
# DEFINITION
# ============================================================

Persona is the core life entity used across Civilization.

A persona consists of:

- identity
- age
- traits
- skills
- stats
- memory
- relationships
- owned assets
- life state

# ============================================================
# RULE
# ============================================================

- persona is persistent
- persona state changes only through defined systems
- persona is usable across compatible domains

# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# SNAPSHOT ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: persona

# ============================================================
# RULE
# ============================================================

- user-created persona snapshots can be taken at any time
- maximum cloud snapshots per persona lineage = 3
- oldest cloud snapshot is overwritten when limit exceeded
- local export is allowed
- local snapshot must be uploaded before reuse in another app



# ============================================================

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/007.persona/050.release-and-distribution/0200070005_PERSONA_RELEASE_INTEGRATION_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# PERSONA RELEASE INTEGRATION ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: persona
owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero

## PURPOSE
Define how CivilizationOS integrates releasable Persona artifacts from PersonaOS.

## SOURCE OF TRUTH
PersonaOS is the source of truth for:
- persona identity
- persona profile
- persona snapshot
- release eligibility
- signature and issuance state

CivilizationOS is the source of truth for:
- product registration
- store presentation
- purchase record
- transaction record
- reward calculation

## RULE
CivilizationOS must never mutate Persona original state directly.
CivilizationOS may reference only released and externally usable Persona artifacts.

## INTEGRATION TARGET
The integration target is a releasable Persona artifact
such as a signed snapshot or equivalent external release unit.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/007.persona/050.release-and-distribution/02000705000_RELEASE_AND_DISTRIBUTION_ARCHITECTURE_INDEX.md

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/007.persona/060.license-and-boundary/0200070006_PERSONA_LICENSE_BOUNDARY_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# PERSONA LICENSE BOUNDARY ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: persona
owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero

## PURPOSE
Define the boundary between PersonaOS license authority and CivilizationOS commercial usage.

## SOURCE OF TRUTH
PersonaOS is the source of truth for:
- license issuance
- entitlement validity
- access grant
- transfer permission
- revocation state

CivilizationOS may:
- sell usage rights
- reference active license state
- reflect availability in product/store UI
- deny access when PersonaOS reports invalid state

## RULE
CivilizationOS must not invent or override license state.
License validity must be synchronized from PersonaOS.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/007.persona/060.license-and-boundary/0200070012_PERSONA_LICENSE_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# PERSONA LICENSE ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: persona

# ============================================================
# RULE
# ============================================================

- persona usage is based on prepaid license
- no post-paid usage model
- license duration and quota are DB-controlled
- distributed persona access is allowed through system rules

# ============================================================

# PERSONA COMMERCE BOUNDARY ARCHITECTURE

status: canonical
layer: architecture
domain: persona
owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero

## PURPOSE
Define the commerce boundary for Persona-derived products.

## PERSONA OS OWNS
- persona original data
- snapshot original data
- release eligibility
- license authority
- access authority

## CIVILIZATION OS OWNS
- product catalog entry
- purchase flow
- transaction flow
- payment handling
- reward distribution

## RULE
A Persona-derived item is sold in CivilizationOS
but remains governed by PersonaOS rights and access state.

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/008.education/010.school-system/3020001_INITIAL_SCHOOL_PROGRESSION_AND_BRANCHING_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL SCHOOL PROGRESSION AND BRANCHING SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: school-progression-and-branching-seed
component: initial-school-progression-and-branching-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for school progression,
exam events,
school transition events,
career branching events,
and post-compulsory education routing
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

School progression and branching must reflect:
- nation identity
- education posture
- class structure
- exam culture
- school access inequality
- labor-market connection
- household support capacity

These are not generic age transitions.
They define how children become students,
how students become candidates,
and how candidates become workers or specialists.


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- primary-to-lower-secondary transition posture
- lower-secondary-to-upper-secondary transition posture
- upper-secondary branching posture
- exam intensity posture
- law / business / technical / arts branching posture
- work-entry and higher-education connection


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

School progression seed must make visible
how education becomes competition,
sorting, and life-course branching.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/008.education/020.exam-system/00802001_EDUCATION_QUALIFICATION_ANNOUNCEMENT_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# EDUCATION QUALIFICATION ANNOUNCEMENT ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: education-qualification-announcement
component: education-qualification-announcement

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for school admission,
qualification examination access,
marketplace distribution,
public announcement,
and personal alerting
inside Civilization.

This architecture defines:

- school admission structure
- qualification structure
- marketplace application forms
- marketplace examination tickets
- announcement behavior
- personal alert behavior
- life-course relevance to Persona progression


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

Education and qualification systems
must not remain hidden market items only.

Because they directly affect
Persona life progression,
career access,
public office access,
and social mobility,
they must be visible through:

- formal public announcements
- marketplace distribution
- personal alerting
- career and life progression surfaces


# ============================================================
# 3. SCHOOL AND QUALIFICATION SEPARATION
# ============================================================

School admissions and qualification exams
must remain separate.

Schools use:

- application forms

Qualifications use:

- examination tickets

This separation must remain visible
in market, UI, and system rules.


# ============================================================
# 4. CURRENCY PRINCIPLE
# ============================================================

All education and qualification related costs
must be payable by:

- national_currency
- civ_cash

CIV_CASH is universally applicable.

National currency remains
the domestic standard baseline.


# ============================================================
# 5. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Education and qualification opportunity
must behave as a visible life system,
not as a hidden backend mechanic.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/008.education/020.exam-system/0200080002_EXAM_ARCHITECTURE.md

# EXAM ARCHITECTURE

layer: architecture
domain: education

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/008.education/030.education-facility-operation/00803001_SCHOOL_DETAILED_CONFIGURATION_AND_AUTO_OPERATION_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# SCHOOL DETAILED CONFIGURATION AND AUTO OPERATION ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: school-detailed-configuration-and-auto-operation
component: school-detailed-configuration-and-auto-operation

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# PURPOSE

Define the canonical detailed configuration,
auto operation,
education quality observation,
capacity management,
and intervention architecture
for schools and education facilities.


# TARGETS

- public_school
- private_school
- university
- vocational_school
- military_school
- ideological_school
- boarding_school


# CORE LOOP

detailed configuration
-> auto academic operation
-> results observation
-> issue detection
-> intervention
-> auto academic operation


# REQUIRED THEMES

- enrollment policy
- tuition and support policy
- teacher allocation
- education focus
- discipline and safety
- dormitory or campus operation
- exam and progression profile


# FINAL RULE

School operation
must remain easy to run by default
while allowing strong policy differentiation.

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/008.education/030.education-facility-operation/3030001_INITIAL_SCHOOL_COMPANY_CITY_EVENT_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL SCHOOL COMPANY CITY EVENT SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: school-company-city-event-seed
component: initial-school-company-city-event-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for school events,
company events,
city events,
festival-linked public events,
and recurring institutional annual cycles
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

School, company, and city events must reflect:
- nation identity
- calendar and holiday posture
- school culture
- labor and hiring culture
- port, market, or industrial identity
- religion and memorial culture
- civic scale and urban symbolism


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- school annual event posture
- company annual event posture
- city and district event posture
- hiring-season and graduation-season effects
- links to religious or national calendar


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

School, company, and city event seed must make visible
how institutions animate the calendar year.

# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/009.career/020.employment-route/2960001_INITIAL_EMPLOYMENT_AND_QUALIFICATION_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL EMPLOYMENT AND QUALIFICATION SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: employment-and-qualification-seed
component: initial-employment-and-qualification-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for employment offices,
job-matching facilities,
career support facilities,
qualification testing facilities,
and vocational transition facilities
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Employment and qualification facilities must reflect:
- nation identity
- labor structure
- education posture
- industry posture
- household structure
- youth transition structure
- public and private hiring culture

For Helios specifically:
- historical AI aptitude-based occupational assignment must remain visible
- Helios-linked firms often continue to hire lower and middle strata
  based on aptitude judgment outcomes
- noble-family business succession remains structurally separate
  from aptitude-based hiring logic

For Gladia specifically:
- compulsory service must remain visible as a major labor-market institution
- eligible citizens enter a three-year service period between ages 25 and 28
- rear-support military deployment may occur during compulsory service
- front-line deployment is prohibited during compulsory service
- employer seat preservation, family support, income guarantee,
  substitute employment support, compensation, and return-to-work retraining
  are part of the labor-system design


# ============================================================
# 3. REQUIRED DIMENSIONS
# ============================================================

Each nation and city seed should define:
- employment naming posture
- qualification naming posture
- vocational transition naming posture
- internship and interview support posture
- city-level assignment


# ============================================================
# 4. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Employment seed must make visible
how students become workers,
how workers change roles,
and how qualifications shape social mobility.


# ============================================================
# FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/01.civilization-system/01.civilization-os/020.architecture/009.career/020.employment-route/2990001_INITIAL_DISABILITY_REHAB_AND_WORK_SUPPORT_SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INITIAL DISABILITY REHAB AND WORK SUPPORT SEED ARCHITECTURE
# ============================================================

status: canonical
layer: architecture
scope: disability-rehab-and-work-support-seed
component: initial-disability-rehab-and-work-support-seed

owner: Boss
prepared_by: Zero


# ============================================================
# 1. PURPOSE
# ============================================================

Defines the canonical architecture
for disability support facilities,
rehabilitation facilities,
daily-life support facilities,
and disability-linked work support facilities
in Civilization seed-world planning.


# ============================================================
# 2. CORE RULE
# ============================================================

Disability, rehabilitation, and work-support facilities
must align with:
- eldercare posture
- nation identity
- household structure
- labor structure
- medical posture
- civic welfare posture
- family vs institutional support logic


# ============================================================
# 3. FINAL RULE
# ============================================================

Disability support seed must make visible
how each society supports function, dignity,
daily life, and work participation.


# ============================================================

# RULE
# ============================================================

- login bonus is DB-controlled
- system-distributed persona is allowed
- no broad free-play slot exists
- reward timing and reward type are DB-controlled
